Evidence Boundary: Protokol X evaluates publicly available documentation, vendor transparency, third-party testing posture, fulfillment/support signals, community references, and stated disclosures. These briefs are informational research-use-only assessments. They are not medical advice, treatment guidance, dosing guidance, product endorsement, or FDA approval language. Affiliate relationships, where present, do not determine Trust Score placement. Peptipura is included as a non-affiliate profile.
Protokol X Vendor Intelligence Series Evaluate evidence, not assumptions.
